name: Swing Space Golf
about:
Swing Space Golf is a comprehensive indoor golf facility located in Columbus, Ohio. It serves as a hub for golf performance, social entertainment, and instruction, utilizing state-of-the-art technology to provide an authentic experience. The venue features a sports bar and offers mobile simulator services, catering to both serious golfers looking to improve their game and casual players seeking a fun outing.

The facility is equipped with Trackman simulators, allowing for precise data analysis and gameplay on world-famous courses. Swing Space offers various pricing tiers, including facility memberships and monthly options, as well as hourly rentals for individuals and groups. The space is designed to accommodate a range of activities, from solo practice sessions and league play to private corporate events and parties.

Beyond the virtual fairways, Swing Space provides a full-service sports bar atmosphere. Guests can enjoy beers, seltzers, cocktails, and simple food options during their visit. The venue emphasizes a community feel, hosting leagues and events while maintaining a professional environment for golf instruction and club fittings.
why_golfers_like_it: Trackman launch monitor technology for accurate data
Full-service sports bar with happy hour specials
Flexible memberships and hourly booking options
Mobile simulator rental service for off-site events
Golf performance center with professional instruction

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar including beer, seltzers, and cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman iO implied by 'camera bay add' options and general Trackman tech references

amenities_list: Sports Bar|Happy Hour|Private Events|Club Fitting|Golf Instruction|Mobile Simulators|Leagues

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, most indoor golf facilities offer rental clubs. It is recommended to contact the venue directly if you need to borrow equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, as a venue with a full sports bar serving beer, cocktails, and food, outside food and drink are likely prohibited.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, 18 holes on a simulator takes about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the skill level and pace of the players.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Space is family-friendly and welcomes children. They offer specific Junior Memberships and host family outings.
